creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text: Can you find an upstream fix for this problem? I believe that most problems related to GCC 5 are already fixed in 2.10.x or 2.12.x releases. We don't automatically get fixes for new compilers because we still use 2.8.x releases on FreeBSD, which is old, unsupported and insecure. I hope the situation can be better after FreeBSD 9 goes EOL.
